title: Claude Fable 5 simulates the solar system and predicts a solar eclipse
summary: Claude Fable 5 built a simulation of the solar system by deriving planets' orbital motion from physics first principles and used it to predict solar eclipses. This demonstrates the model's ability to perform scientific reasoning and simulation.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 constructing a solar system simulation by deriving planetary orbital motion from first principles in physics, then applying that simulation to predict solar eclipses. It illustrates the model's capacity for scientific reasoning rather than retrieval, since the orbital behavior emerges from physical laws rather than stored answers. The concrete takeaway: the same simulation that models planetary motion also forecasts eclipse events.
